displayName: Key Vault must have diagnostic settings to the platform Log Analytics workspace
description: Audit logs (key access, secret access, vault administration) must flow to the platform's Log Analytics workspace per ADR 0005. AuditIfNotExists effect: detects vaults without a diagnostic setting routing to the platform workspace. A setting routed anywhere else does not satisfy the policy.

metadata.description: AuditIfNotExists or Disabled. Defaults to AuditIfNotExists per ADR 0008. DeployIfNotExists is intentionally not offered — the module's deployment is the source of the diagnostic setting; the policy detects drift, it does not heal.
Resource ID of the platform LAW that must receive the vault's diagnostic logs.
